violations.text: The establishment's kitchen is lacking a 3-compartment sink. Currently the kitchen has a 2-bay sink which also acts as the kitchen's handwashing sink. Establishments shall have a sink with at least 3 compartments shall be provided for manually washing, rinsing, and sanitizing; equipment and utensils. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2021

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the bar 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
